compile_only.description: Exact compiler diagnostics that do not train from random initialization.

perturbed_basin.description: Perturbed true-tree basin evidence with known starts.

pure_blind.description: Random-initialized blind training evidence, kept separate from repairs and scaffolds.

refit.description: Frozen exact-tree constant refit diagnostics, separate from discovery evidence.

repaired.description: Verifier-gated local repair evidence, separate from the original selected candidate.

same_ast_return.description: Runs that returned the exact same AST or equivalent same-AST evidence.

scaffolded.description: Blind training with declared scaffold initializers, not pure blind discovery.
